name: Quintesson Overmind
oracle_text:
Whenever you sacrifice an Energon token, draw a card.
Alt-Mode (Orbital Array) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 7/7 and it gains flying and "Whenever ~ attacks, tap target nonland permanent." Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Logic is the only absolute in a multiverse of chaos.
design_notes: Designed for the UB (Logic Corruption) archetype, Quintesson Overmind rewards the player for managing Energon resources by providing card advantage. As a Mythic, its Alt-Mode provides a massive 'Titan' level presence that functions as a control finisher—it transforms into a high-power aerial threat that disrupts the opponent's board state via tapping rather than direct destruction (staying within Blue's color pie). The CMC 5 cost and mythic rarity reflect its status as a world-shaping machine.
